title: Daniel Liang's Approach to Advanced Java Concepts
description: A flowchart illustrating the core pillars of Advanced Java as presented by Daniel Liang in his widely-used textbook, showing how they build upon fundamental Java knowledge.
relationships: Data Structures & Algorithms are a core application of advanced concepts
GUI & FX enables interactive application development
Concurrency & Multithreading allows for efficient, parallel execution
Database Programming connects applications to persistent data storage
